entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange using an AMM design derived from an elastic parameterized limit-order-book model. DefiLlama reports BrownFi activity across multiple chains with non-zero recent DEX volume, and the first-party BrownFi site and application remain reachable, so HEI classifies it as active.
entity.notes: No reliable first-party launch date was recovered during this batch, so launch_date remains null. Current status is based on current protocol metrics plus a reachable first-party site and application.

evidence.title: BrownFi protocol profile and DEX metrics
evidence.notes: Profile classifies BrownFi as a DEX, describes its AMM model, lists multiple deployment chains, and reports non-zero recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: BrownFi official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party site identifies BrownFi and links to the live application.
